mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in the industrial production index over the past 60 trading days signals a strengthening supply chain that boosts corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO increases by > 10% over the past 60 trading days
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in strengthening supply periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism fails to hold in at least 2 consecutive late-cycle expansions.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals a tightening labor market that compresses wage growth and boosts corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in tightening labor periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism fails to hold in at least 2 consecutive post-shock recoveries.

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in housing starts over the past 5 trading days signals a strengthening housing market that boosts consumer confidence and spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST increases by > 10% over the past 5 trading days
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in strengthening housing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism fails to hold in at least 2 consecutive instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 10% increase in real disposable personal income over the past 20 trading days signals a strengthening consumer economy that boosts spending and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS increases by > 10% over the past 20 trading days
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in strengthening consumer periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism fails to hold in at least 2 consecutive instances.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in initial jobless claims above 250,000 signals a weakening labor market that boosts wage growth and compresses corporate profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases by > 250,000 over the past 3 months
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in weakening labor periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism fails to hold in at least 2 consecutive late-cycle expansions.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the consumer price index above 3.5% signals a tightening monetary cycle that boosts interest rates and compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL increases by > 3.5% over the past 3 months
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in tightening monetary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism fails to hold in at least 2 consecutive monetary tightening cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A 10% decline in the industrial production index over the past 60 trading days signals a weakening supply chain that boosts corporate costs and compresses profitability, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO decreases by > 10% over the past 60 trading days
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in weakening supply periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the mechanism fails to hold in at least 2 consecutive post-shock recoveries.
